highlights.text: State-of-the-art conference facilities with mountain-view presentation halls in Shimla
Curated team-building challenges at Kufri meadows & Mashobra forest ropes course
Executive networking cocktail terrace with sunset Himalayan panoramas
Gala dinner ballroom with live entertainment and bespoke corporate branding
Leadership workshop modules amid cedar forests — elevation meets inspiration
Dedicated MICE event manager with TRAGUIN 24/7 corporate concierge support

itinerary.title: Corporate Himachal — Elevation, Leadership & Synergy
itinerary.overview: TRAGUIN's Corporate Himachal MICE retreat transforms Shimla's mountain grandeur into a catalyst for leadership, team synergy, and strategic alignment. Three nights at a premium convention resort feature state-of-the-art conference halls, curated team-building at Kufri and Mashobra, executive networking cocktails, and a gala dinner ballroom — all with dedicated MICE event management and 24/7 corporate concierge support.
itinerary.seo_title: HP-015 | Corporate Himachal MICE Retreat | TRAGUIN Premium Events
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 03 Nights / 04 Days corporate MICE package (HP-015) in Shimla with conference facilities, team-building at Kufri and Mashobra, gala dinner, and executive networking. Ideal for corporate retreats, leadership offsites, and incentive travel.

days.title: Arrival & Conference Kickoff, Shimla
days.description: Your corporate retreat begins with a professional TRAGUIN welcome at Chandigarh Airport or Railway Station. Transfer to your premium convention resort in Shimla, check in, and commence the opening conference session in a state-of-the-art mountain-view presentation hall.
activities: Conference Included: Welcome address, opening keynote session, and breakout room allocation
Evening Experience: Executive networking cocktail on the terrace with Himalayan sunset views
Meals Included: Working lunch, coffee breaks & welcome dinner

days.title: Team Building at Kufri & Mashobra
days.description: A full day of curated outdoor team-building activities. Morning challenges at Kufri meadows include group adventure races and collaborative problem-solving. Afternoon leadership workshop modules amid Mashobra's cedar forests with ropes course elements.
activities: Team Building Included: Kufri group adventure challenge, Mashobra forest ropes course, leadership workshop modules
Evening Experience: Debrief session and team celebration dinner with live mountain music
Meals Included: Breakfast, outdoor BBQ lunch & celebration dinner

days.title: Strategy Sessions & Gala Dinner
days.description: Morning strategy and alignment sessions in the conference hall with dedicated AV support and breakout rooms. Afternoon free time for Mall Road networking walks. Evening gala dinner in the resort ballroom with bespoke corporate branding and live entertainment.
activities: Conference Included: Strategy alignment sessions, breakout workshops, closing presentations
Evening Experience: Gala dinner ballroom event with live entertainment and awards ceremony
Meals Included: Breakfast, working lunch & gala dinner

days.title: Shimla to Chandigarh / Departure
days.description: Enjoy a final breakfast and closing remarks before your private luxury coaches transfer the team to Chandigarh Airport or Railway Station with renewed synergy and leadership clarity.
activities: Transfers Included: Private luxury coach or sedan fleet to Chandigarh Airport / Railway Station

hotels.name: Hotel Combermere / Similar
hotels.description: Deluxe convention hotel with meeting rooms in Shimla.

hotels.name: Radisson Hotel Shimla / Similar
hotels.description: Premium hill resort with conference facilities.

hotels.name: The Cecil — Oberoi / Similar
hotels.description: Luxury heritage hotel with ballroom event space.

hotels.name: Wildflower Hall, An Oberoi Resort / Similar
hotels.description: Ultra-luxury resort with private conference pavilion.

inclusions.text: 03 nights premium convention resort accommodation in Shimla for all delegates
Daily breakfasts, working lunches, coffee breaks, and gala dinner (MAPAI plan)
State-of-the-art conference hall with AV equipment, breakout rooms, and Wi-Fi
Dedicated TRAGUIN MICE event manager and 24/7 corporate concierge support
Curated Kufri team-building and Mashobra leadership workshop with professional facilitators
Private luxury coach or sedan fleet transfers from Chandigarh and all local sightseeing
Airfare or train tickets to and from Chandigarh for delegates
Gala dinner premium branding, custom staging, and live entertainment upgrades
Alcoholic beverages beyond welcome cocktail reception
Personal expenses, laundry, and individual tipping
